creator: matthew.l.dailey@dartmouth.edu
text:
Thanks, Gleb - this is fabulous! I'll try to get a kernel compiled with the patch and start testing soon. Given what we know so far, it will be at least 10 days before I'll know if this works, and will want to test far longer to be sure.

Given what you've learned about this, is there anything you can think of to accelerate the process or drive the issue to make it happen more quickly?
